sentences.arabic: يَعْتَمِدُ النَّجَاحُ فِي الشَّرِكَةِ عَلَى التَّعَاوُنِ بَيْنَ الْمُوَظَّفِينَ.
sentences.translation: Uspjeh u firmi zavisi od saradnje među zaposlenicima.
sentences.translationEn: Success in the company depends on cooperation between employees.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ الْفَرِيقُ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ الْأَفْكَارِ الْجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tim se sastaje svake sedmice kako bi razgovarali o novim idejama.
sentences.translationEn: The team meets every week to discuss new ideas.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الزُّمَلَاءُ بَعْضَهُمْ بَعْضًا لِتَحْقِيقِ الْأَهْدَافِ الْمُشْتَرَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kolege pomažu jedni drugima u ostvarivanju zajedničkih ciljeva.
sentences.translationEn: Colleagues help each other to achieve common goals.
